title: Mayor Owens Announces Return of Veo Micromobility Operations for 2026 Season
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced the return of Veo's shared micromobility service to Syracuse effective March 9, 2026, following its seasonal winter suspension. The 2025 season generated 648,000 rides exceeding 1 million miles, with 24% ridership growth. Survey data shows 66% of riders lack car access and 52% use Veo to connect with transit. The updated 2026 agreement includes cargo baskets, expanded community outreach, improved accessibility measures, and underage riding prevention.

political_signal.description: Mayor actively championing Veo micromobility program as aligned with transportation equity, transit connectivity, and Vision Zero goals
